subject: From Bruce Jaeger: FW: Historical Performance of the Fund's Strategy
body:
________________________________

From: Duncan Yin [mailto:dyin@hdam.com] 
Sent: Friday, February 01, 2008 4:59 PM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Historical Performance of the Fund's Strategy



Jeffrey,

 

Bruce Jaeger passed along your request for a "two-pager" summarizing the
historical returns from our fund's investment strategy.  As you will
see, the attached document explains the variety of research conducted by
me and sell-side research departments which supports our target return
of 20% with limited risk in the form of only 10% of the fund's assets
exposed at any single time.  These figures also comport with my
investment returns running a similar portfolio at Silver Point Capital.

 

I have tried to summarize our full marketing presentation, which I
believe you received from Ghislaine Maxwell.  Please feel free to ask
questions of Bruce at (917) 494-7447 or me at the numbers below.  Thank
you very much for your interest.  I look forward to hearing your
reaction to this material.

 

Regards,

Duncan A. Yin

 

Work:  (203) 569-4524

Cell:  (203) 856-8148

 

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------

This correspondence is intended for the addressee only. The information
in this correspondence has been obtained from sources which Harbor Drive
Asset Management LLC ("HDAM") believes to be reliable. However, HDAM
does not guarantee its accuracy, and such information may be incomplete
or condensed. Opinions in this correspondence represent HDAM's position
as of this date and are subject to change without notice. This
correspondence is for informational purposes only and is not intended as
an offer or solicitation in regard to the purchase or sale of any
security. HDAM and/or its officers and employees may from time to time
acquire, hold, or sell a position in the securities mentioned herein.
Upon request, HDAM will furnish specific information in this regard. If
HDAM is involved in the purchase or sale of any security, HDAM may act
as principal for its own account or as agent for the buyer and/or the
seller.
body_html:
From: Duncan Yin [mailto:dyin@hdam.com]
Sent: Friday, February 01, 2008 4:59 PM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Historical Performance of the Fund's Strategy

Jeffrey,

 

Bruce Jaeger passed along your request for a “two-pager” summarizing the historical returns from our fund’s investment strategy.  As you will see, the attached document explains the variety of research conducted by me and sell-side research departments which supports our target return of 20% with limited risk in the form of only 10% of the fund’s assets exposed at any single time.  These figures also comport with my investment returns running a similar portfolio at Silver Point Capital.

 

I have tried to summarize our full marketing presentation, which I believe you received from Ghislaine Maxwell.  Please feel free to ask questions of Bruce at (917) 494-7447 or me at the numbers below.  Thank you very much for your interest.  I look forward to hearing your reaction to this material.

 

Regards,

Duncan A. Yin

 

Work:  (203) 569-4524

Cell:  (203) 856-8148

 

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This correspondence is intended for the addressee only. The information in this correspondence has been obtained from sources which Harbor Drive Asset Management LLC ("HDAM") believes to be reliable. However, HDAM does not guarantee its accuracy, and such information may be incomplete or condensed. Opinions in this correspondence represent HDAM’s position as of this date and are subject to change without notice. This correspondence is for informational purposes only and is not intended as an offer or solicitation in regard to the purchase or sale of any security. HDAM and/or its officers and employees may from time to time acquire, hold, or sell a position in the securities mentioned herein. Upon request, HDAM will furnish specific information in this regard. If HDAM is involved in the purchase or sale of any security, HDAM may act as principal for its own account or as agent for the buyer and/or the seller.
